title: tretorhiza olivieri
intro: Tretorhiza olivieri, also known as the Rhizome of Gastrodia, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-fungal properties. The health benefits of Tretorhiza olivieri include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. In herbal preparations, Tretorhiza olivieri is often dried and processed into a powder or tea, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
